ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Home team name */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Away team name */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium name */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators in the stadium */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "umpire" TEXT /* Name of the umpire officiating the game */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "severity" INTEGER /* Severity level of the event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game the comment belongs to */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_tx" TEXT /* Comment text */,
  "filename_tx" TEXT /* Filename of the comment file */,
  "line_number_ct" INTEGER /* Line number of the comment */,
  "comment_type" TEXT /* Type of comment */,
  "comment_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "batting_average" TEXT /* Batting average of the player */,
  "era" TEXT /* Earned Run Average (ERA) of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium the team plays in */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team manager */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "team_foundation_date" TEXT /* Date the team was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the stadium */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the stadium opened */,
  "stadium_type" TEXT /* Type of stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_events" (
  "game_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game event */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game the event belongs to */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the event in minutes */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location of the event within the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_events_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_events" (
  "player_game_event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game event */,
  "game_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game event the player participated in */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event the player participated in */,
  "event_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event for the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_events_game_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_event_id") REFERENCES game_events ("game_event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_comments" (
  "game_comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game comment */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "comment_source" TEXT /* Source of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_comments_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the game data */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game the version belongs to */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Name of the user who created the version */,
  "version_reason" TEXT /* Reason for creating the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_versions" (
  "game_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game version */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game the version belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "game_version_date" TEXT /* Date of the game version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the game version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_versions_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_versions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
